title: Plan-Roadmap Curation Response
description: Written by the orchestrating Claude Code agent in host-assisted mode (Mode A). Decisions are applied by decomposer's finalize pass to produce the final roadmap.yaml. Each decision targets one original_id from curation-request.json.

original_id.description: Must match a candidate's original_id from curation-request.json.

action.description: keep=retain (with optional overrides); drop=remove; merge=fold into another item.

rationale.description: One-line reason. Recorded for audit; not behaviorally load-bearing.

new_id.description: Optional renamed ID. Only meaningful when action=keep.

depends_on.description: May reference original_ids from the request OR new_ids declared in other decisions. Normalized on apply.

merge_into.description: Required when action=merge. May reference an original_id or a new_id.
